fhparry.name: Parry Prototype
fhparry.desc: Timing-based inputs during enemy attacks. Toggle parry and choose a difficulty preset.
fhparry.enabled.name: Enable Parry
fhparry.enabled.desc: Master switch for the parry helper.
fhparry.audio.name: Play Audio Feedback
fhparry.audio.desc: Play random custom Parry_0x.wav clips on successful parries.
fhparry.audio_volume.name: Parry Audio Volume
fhparry.audio_volume.desc: Volume for custom parry WAV playback.
fhparry.parry_state_hud.name: Parry State HUD
fhparry.parry_state_hud.desc: Show a top-center text indicator for current parry state (-, Waiting, Open, Succeeded, Missed).
fhparry.startup_skip.name: Startup Skip (Experimental)
fhparry.startup_skip.desc: One-shot force-load shortcut to jump to title/menu faster on startup.
fhparry.ctb.name: Boost Overdrive Gauge
fhparry.ctb.desc: Grant a small Overdrive gain to defenders on a successful parry.
fhparry.negate.name: Negate Damage
fhparry.negate.desc: Attempt to nullify the next incoming damage when a parry succeeds.
fhparry.logging.name: Debug Logging
fhparry.logging.desc: Write additional parry state changes to the log when enabled.
fhparry.debug_overlay.name: Debug Overlay
fhparry.debug_overlay.desc: Display a live event feed and mapped runtime state panel in-game.
fhparry.difficulty.name: Parry Difficulty
fhparry.difficulty.desc: Select preset parry timing windows and anti-spam behavior (Easy, Normal, Expert, Debug).
fhparry.future.name: Future Features
